heading: Sunday Night
text: Rain showers, mixing with snow north, turning over to a wintry mix as temperatures drop from north to south. Some of the warmer valleys west and south could see freezing rain before the system is out. Lows in the 20s north to near 30 south. North wind at 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Monday
text: A chance of snow, mixing with rain in southern valleys, then beginning to dissipate in the morning. Highs in the low to mid 30s north, upper 30s to near 40 south. Northwest wind at 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Monday Night
text: Snow showers tapering off, then some clearing, and temperatures dropping. Lows in the teens to near 20, near 10 over the higher terrain north.
